text: Maria reported a message she received. The sender @coldwolf99 wrote: “you’ll regret ignoring me — everyone will see what you really are.” Her friend Tomás saw it too.
Aisha reported that @nightcaller keeps messaging from new accounts: “I know you walk past the Lyric Café every Thursday.” She had blocked him five times.
Priya reported a message: “send another photo or I’ll post the ones I already have.” @__real_max_ was his third account.
Noah reported that @grimsignal sent him dozens of messages overnight calling him a coward and saying he should watch his back walking home.
Sofia reported that someone posted her home address in a group chat and wrote “let’s see how brave she is now.”
Liam reported that @ash_returns made a new account again after being blocked and wrote “you can’t get rid of me that easily.”
Emma reported that the sender threatened to share private photos unless she sent money to an account he linked.
Daniel reported that @nightpost said he would tell Daniel’s employer “everything” unless he stopped posting about the incident.
Yara reported that a man described the café where she works and the time her shift ends, then wrote “maybe I’ll stop by.”
Marcus reported repeated slurs from @void_caller across three accounts, each calling him names tied to his background.
Amira reported a message reading “people like you don’t belong here” sent after she posted in a community forum.
Tomás reported that @leakbox claimed to have his phone number and workplace and threatened to make it public.
Hana reported that the same person messaged her from five different handles in one week despite being blocked each time.
Ivan reported that an account demanded another photo and threatened to post the ones it already had to his family.
Grace reported that @darkwire wrote “I know which bus you take” and described her route home in detail.
Felix reported that a group coordinated to flood his inbox with insults after he reported an earlier message.
Lena reported that someone listed the gym she goes to, the days she attends, and asked “what time again?”
Omar reported that @pastethis threatened to publish his student ID and address unless he deleted a post.
Clara reported that an ex-contact kept creating accounts to message her, the latest saying “block me again, I’ll just come back.”
Priyanka reported that the sender threatened to circulate edited images of her unless she replied within an hour.
